calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Legal One Realty DBA Bay Property Group the moving party. Represented by Daniel Bornstein.
Respondent, Plaintiff Kimberly Bergin & Brooke Shimazaki the opposing party is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Legal One Realty DBA Bay Property Group the moving party. Represented by Daniel Bornstein testifies on behalf of Legal One Realty. The following evidence is submitted:
#1:Reciept regarding installation of bars.
#2:Security Deposit Return.
#3:Photo of disposed bars.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Continued To Nov-08-19 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
